meta.title: Pricing — ClassAuto
meta.description: Free, Basic and Pro plans plus the student-side usage limits, on one page. No advertising, auto-deletion after graduation.

hero.title: Per-semester pricing without surprises
hero.subtitle: Cost is contained by a dual cap on episode count and active learners. No credits, no per-minute billing.

basic.name: Basic
basic.ctaNote: During the beta, university faculty get full Pro access for free.

limitsTable.title: Student-side usage limits
limitsTable.subtitle: Student interaction guardrails apply to every plan (Guardrail system §5).

limitsModal.title: {plan} — full limits
limitsModal.footer: Part of the §3 frequency layer of the 4-stage cost guardrail system.

enterprise.title: Institutional license
enterprise.subtitle: Unlimited learners, negotiated render quota, multi-tenant + SSO. Department- or college-wide deployment.
items: Campus attendance roll-up + volume discount per faculty seat

items.desc: Annual is the default (monthly-equivalent shown). Toggle smoothly animates the price; honors prefers-reduced-motion.
Credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, AMEX), KakaoPay, TossPay, NaverPay. Institutional payments accept tax invoice + bank transfer.
1-click cancellation (Stripe Customer Portal). Continue using until the end of the current cycle; data retained 60 days; auto-restored on re-signup within that window.
Pro→Basic keeps existing videos as-is. Basic→Free hides episodes beyond the 8-cap (no deletion). Excess learners grace until next billing cycle.
100% refund within 7 days if no video has been generated. No refunds afterwards. hello@classauto.live
Every plan can download lecture mp4s (up to 60 days post-cancellation). Pro adds anonymised student CSV and Q&A logs for research.

items.q: Do unused renders carry over to next month?
items.a: No, they don't. The 8-render Basic cap is tuned for the 3–4 courses a typical Korean professor teaches in a month.

items.q: What happens to existing videos when I upgrade Free → Basic?
items.a: They stay in place; the watermark is automatically removed, and the share links don't change.
Yes — by monthly active learner (anyone who watched a video in the month). Free 30, Basic 80, Pro 150. Larger classes need an institutional license.
Anytime. Upgrades apply immediately; downgrades start at the next billing cycle.

items.q: Any benefit for the beta period?
items.a: During the 2026 Phase 2 beta, university faculty get the full Pro feature set for free. Beta users keep a lifetime 30% discount after launch.

items.q: Can students use the Q&A chatbot for off-topic questions?
items.a: No. ClassAuto's Q&A is RAG-bound to the lecture material; out-of-scope questions are refused (similarity threshold 0.7). See the security page for the policy.

items.q: What if a student leaves the video playing unattended?
items.a: Interstitial quizzes appear every 5–15 minutes. Failing to respond within 30 seconds auto-pauses the video; three accumulated misses voids that watch session. Concurrent playback is capped at 1 per student.
Visa, MasterCard, AMEX, KakaoPay, TossPay, NaverPay. Institutional buyers can also pay via tax invoice + bank transfer.
Within 7 days of payment, with no videos generated yet, 100% refund. Otherwise no refund. Contact hello@classauto.live.

betaCallout.title: Beta — Pro free for academia
betaCallout.body: Until the end of the 2026 beta, university faculty can use the full Pro tier free of charge. Pricing after general availability will be decided once we've gathered user feedback at the end of the beta.

footerCta.title: First lecture ships in 12 minutes
footerCta.body: One PPT deck is all it takes — every plan ships your first lecture in about 12 minutes.
